about_item: Upgraded Sturdy Metal Construction: Our IRONCK dog crate furniture features 1.0mm thickened iron rods (upgraded from 0.8mm) and reinforced cross bars on both sides, specially designed to resist biting and damage from large, active dogs. Sturdy metal framing ensures long-lasting use—no more worries about your pup destroying their crate

Double Storage Capacity: Built-in storage shelf + hanging 4 hooks design delivers double the storage of standard dog crates, offering ample organized space for dog food, canned treats, toys, leashes and all pet essentials. Keep your dog’s living area neat and all supplies within easy reach with this functional storage solution

2-in-1 Furniture-Style Dog Crate: This versatile dog crate doubles as a stylish coffee table/end table, seamlessly blending into your home decor. The solid, stable top supports up to 180 lbs, perfect for displaying photo frames, potted plants, decorative items or daily essentials—maximizing your home space

Safe & Comfortable Design: Crafted from high-grade wood and heavy-duty metal, this dog crate furniture ensures extreme durability and longevity. Well-ventilated structure promotes optimal airflow for your dog’s all-day comfort, while the reinforced metal door lock adds extra security, keeping even mischievous pups safely contained

Easy Assembly: Comes with detailed step-by-step user-friendly instructions + all necessary assembly tools—no extra tools needed! The simple, intuitive assembly process lets you set up this dog crate furniture effortlessly and quickly, so your furry friend can enjoy their cozy new space in no time
All boards used are made from FSC-certified wood.

summary.text: Customers find the dog crate to be well-made furniture that fits perfectly and is easy to assemble. They appreciate its spacious interior, with one customer noting it provides enough room to grow and move around, and consider it heavy-duty for its price. The appearance receives positive feedback, with one mentioning it looks great as furniture, while opinions about size are mixed, with some finding it good for large dogs while others say it's smaller than advertised.

authors_reviews.title: Very sturdy
authors_reviews.text: I purchased this one and also the corner one for my smaller dog. My big guy is about 80lbs and pretty long. Fits well in this one. He was previously in a 42” wire crate. My little girl is about 48lbs and more compact. She was previously in a 30” wire crate and fits well in the corner style. These are extremely sturdy, but it makes them quite heavy. I did assemble and move them on my own. You can see in the photo that I assembled the corner one on top of a kitchen mat so that I could drag it where I needed it and then flip it over since it has to be assembled upside down. This rectangle one is much easier to assemble and move. Definitely before assembly you want to wipe all the pieces with a wet cloth to get off dust and styrofoam. It does clean easily. My dogs are not destructive in the crate, but if you have a dog who has a hard time it’s definitely more durable than a wire crate. The one down side for me is a don’t like the latch. I would have preferred a regular crate latch or something else. Personal preference. Worth the money for to have something that looks nice in the living room and also functional. I hope I never have to move or disassemble though.
authors_reviews.author: Smyle

authors_reviews.title: Perfect for our labradoodle
authors_reviews.text: This was perfect for our labradoodle. Size was great, room for her to move around. Love the look of it can’t wait to decorate it. Very easy to put together. It comes with everything you need to assemble it. Very sturdy, very spacious, very cute! Very pleased with my purchase.
authors_reviews.author: Savannah

authors_reviews.title: Nice piece of furniture works perfectly
authors_reviews.text: I love this. Easy to assemble. My Basset is comfortable and not crowded. It also looks nice in my home not just an ugly wire create.
authors_reviews.author: Wayne Green

authors_reviews.title: Perfect size for my lab!
authors_reviews.text: Perfect size for my lab, the door is strong and opens nice and quietly. The wood material is not as high quality as I hoped, but it’s beautiful put together.
authors_reviews.author: Amber LeAnn

authors_reviews.title: Amazing and roomy (beware of dogs with accidents)
authors_reviews.text: Honestly exceeded my expectations! Super cute, sturdy and easy to clean! Fits my 8 month old German shepherd mix puppy! If you also have a huge puppy this fits great and gives room to grow! But if you have a puppy that has accidents I will warn you it can seep through the cracks and get onto the floor underneath. Only issue is if you have an accident prone puppy! You have to lift it and clean under it and it’s not the most lightweight to lift and clean under but everything else is great! It has a nice latch just be aware if you have a smart dog and don’t push the latch down all the way they may be able to lick the latch open but other than that if you’re aware of how it’s treated it’s an amazing product! My dog is not able to chew through this either and he chewed through the mat of his temporary wire crate! Amazing crate!! 10/10
authors_reviews.author: Alexis

authors_reviews.title: Sturdy and spacious dog crate (package VERY large and heavy)
authors_reviews.text: Alright so, overall, its great once built- but wow! It took over an hour to get everything together and I would suggest having a partner or someone there to help. Firstly, it arrived damaged and missing a whole bunch of pieces (probably due to the shipping facility because the box had a gigantic hole in it). I reached out to the seller directly and they promptly shipped a entirely new unit & told me to keep whatever I received. I ended up gifting what I received and my buddy was able to assemble it using some old know how + wood fasteners. My new dog crate arrived and shipment was not damaged this time, and honestly its great. I believe it can hold a lot of weight on top, its very sturdy. My dog loves the extra space, as soon as I replaced his small kennel with it, he began to run up and down the hall as if he was extremely happy. All in all, 10/10 customer service, and quality product. Note that it is particle board, however its assembly does give it some extra rigidity and feels pretty solid when assembled. It does not feel flimsy which I was worried about.
authors_reviews.author: Pepe the reviewer

authors_reviews.title: Pretty and sturdy
authors_reviews.text: This is a really nice crate. Spacious enough for my Great Pyr and really sturdy. Easy to put together just follow the order in the instructions. You might want some better tools though.
authors_reviews.author: Doug Wolfe

authors_reviews.title: Beautiful
authors_reviews.text: Love this kennel! So beautiful. Fits my adult Giant Schnauzer. Has hooks for her leashes and collars.
authors_reviews.author: Diego
